## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory interview between Bridget McGillivray and Mariana Marins for a potential assistant role at a rapidly growing AI-driven content production company.](https://fathom.video/share/o8YS4sPjvanJ68xYbr4ak2cZpvzNyLq2?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Company: Less than 1 year old, 40 customers, 50 employees (up from 15 in January), AI+human content production](https://fathom.video/share/o8YS4sPjvanJ68xYbr4ak2cZpvzNyLq2?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [Mariana: Diverse background (arts, marketing, translation), currently juggling 2 roles (VA at Bored Panda, EA at Flax Hospitality)](https://fathom.video/share/o8YS4sPjvanJ68xYbr4ak2cZpvzNyLq2?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)
  - [Impressive skills: AI workflow optimization, training leadership, social media management, operations](https://fathom.video/share/o8YS4sPjvanJ68xYbr4ak2cZpvzNyLq2?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)
  - [Seeking: Single full-time role combining responsibilities, growth potential, team leadership (ops/marketing focus)](https://fathom.video/share/o8YS4sPjvanJ68xYbr4ak2cZpvzNyLq2?tab=summary&timestamp=2075.0)

## Topics

### Company Overview

  - [Less than 1 year old, rapidly growing AI-driven content production company](https://fathom.video/share/o8YS4sPjvanJ68xYbr4ak2cZpvzNyLq2?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [40 customers (including big brands), strong revenue growth](https://fathom.video/share/o8YS4sPjvanJ68xYbr4ak2cZpvzNyLq2?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
  - [50 employees (up from 15 in January when Bridget joined)](https://fathom.video/share/o8YS4sPjvanJ68xYbr4ak2cZpvzNyLq2?tab=summary&timestamp=774.0)
  - [Current: AI workflows + human QA/editing for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/o8YS4sPjvanJ68xYbr4ak2cZpvzNyLq2?tab=summary&timestamp=782.0)
  - [Future: Develop UI/platform for customer self-service](https://fathom.video/share/o8YS4sPjvanJ68xYbr4ak2cZpvzNyLq2?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)
